grade_description: 俸點 (Pay Point) — Taiwan's unified pay scale. Each civil servant's rank (職等 grade × 級 step) maps to a 俸點 value from 160 (lowest entry) to 800 (top of 簡任 senior appointment). This page shows the full 俸點 → 月支數額 mapping published by DGPA. 委任 (Elementary Appointment) covers 職等 1-5; 薦任 (Recommended) covers 6-9; 簡任 (Designated) covers 10-14.

教育人員薪額 (Education Personnel Pay) — parallel pay scale for public-school teachers, professors, and administrators under 教師待遇條例. Uses 薪額 points (90 to 770) rather than 俸點; monthly amounts match the civil-service 俸額 scale at equivalent levels.
